pi_items.source: Verified by reading setup_task.sh which generates the file at this exact path.
Verified by reading the task description and confirming these exact 5 airlines are generated and tested by the verifier.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated dataset of 10,000 flight records. The correct target file path is /home/ga/Documents/flight_data.xlsx. The user correctly requested liability summaries for 5 target airlines: AA, DL, UA, WN, and B6. For reference, correct totals are: AA (1478 flights, $91800 payout, $62.11 avg), DL (1422 flights, $94050 payout, $66.14 avg), UA (1448 flights, $86650 payout, $59.84 avg), WN (1431 flights, $86900 payout, $60.73 avg), and B6 (1367 flights, $85400 payout, $62.47 avg).
